title: GLM-5.2 + Z-Code (Ultra Mode - Free Tier): FABLE LEVEL PERFORMANCE!
summary: The video demonstrates how to configure GLM-5.2 within Z-Code using KingMode, skills, MCPs, and verification workflows to achieve high coding performance on the free tier. The author argues this setup approximates frontier model capabilities in real app-building scenarios.
writeup: The video walks through configuring GLM-5.2 inside Z Code to reach strong coding performance on the free tier, using KingMode, planning skills, verification workflows, MCPs, and Goal Mode. It centers on an iterative loop of Explore, Plan, Build, Verify, Review, and Patch, paired with test-time compute and structured verification. Concrete recommendations include keeping MCPs minimal and applying negative design constraints for frontend work.
